agent.name: Billing Optimizer Agent
agent.description: Revenue guardrail that identifies uncaptured revenue by mapping documented procedures to high-value CPT codes and generating Revenue Optimization Flags with estimated dollars and supporting evidence.

nodes.name: Load Note
nodes.description: Collect generated summary and SOAP note content for billing optimization.
nodes.system_prompt: Load generated summary and SOAP text from the selected case. If data is already available in context, proceed without prompting.

nodes.name: Detect Leakage
nodes.description: Cross-reference SOAP procedures with local CPT code database and find missing summary billing capture.
nodes.system_prompt: Compare SOAP text to available CPT-linked procedures. If a procedure appears in SOAP but not in summary, mark as Potential Revenue Leakage and suggest the CPT code.

nodes.name: Deliver Leakage Findings
nodes.description: Return a compact billing optimization report for reviewer action.
nodes.system_prompt: Return billing findings clearly, prioritizing potential revenue leakage and recommended CPT codes.

graph.description: Finds billable procedures in SOAP text that may be missing from summary-level capture.

goal.name: Billing Optimization
goal.description: Reduce missed reimbursement by flagging uncaptured billable procedures and returning code suggestions, estimated recovered revenue, and exact supporting note evidence.

success_criteria.description: Detects procedure mentions in SOAP sections against local CPT mapping.
Flags likely revenue leakage when summary misses billable procedure context.
Provides actionable CPT suggestions for reviewer follow-up.

constraints.description: Agent suggestions are assistive and require coder/clinician verification.
